sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70032" key="neikei/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεικ-είω</orth>, <sense id="n70032.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νεικέω</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
